title: Admin_tools
description: This mod adds a lot of different in-game tools that can be used to easily maintain, for example, Essential servers.
body:
**This mod adds a lot of different in-game tools that can be used to easily maintain, for example, Essential servers.**

 

**This mod adds:**

-Ban sword =bans the player when hitted

-Kick sword =kicks the player when hitted

-Warn sword =gives the player warn when hitted (works with warn plugin that use /warn <player name> command)


 
**All commands you need to know:**

- /ban_sword =gives you a ban sword

- /kick_sword =gives you a kick sword

- /warn_sword =gives you a warn sword

- /warn =gives warn to the nearest player who is in survival mode!

 

**NOTE:**

This mod is still in beta so this can be buggy and may not be compatible with some mods.

Please report any bugs to us if you meet one.

This mod is not yet compatible with plugins that use's /warn command even if it is said at the top.

We are trying our best to update this mod.

 

Thanks for listening!
